11/19/25, 6:06‚ÄĮPM - Talha Butt: Pakistani Chai (Doodh Patti) Recipe

Ingredients (2 cups)

Water: 1 cup

Milk: 1 cup (whole milk preferred)

Black tea leaves: 1‚Äď1.5 teaspoons (strong loose tea works best)

Sugar: 1‚Äď2 teaspoons, to taste

Green cardamom: 2 pods, lightly crushed

Optional: a small piece of fresh ginger, crushed


Method

1. Add water, cardamom, and (optional) ginger to a small pot. Bring to a boil.


2. Add tea leaves and let them boil for 1‚Äď2 minutes to extract flavor.


3. Pour in milk and reduce heat to medium.


4. Let the mixture simmer for 3‚Äď5 minutes until it deepens in color and slightly thickens.


5. Add sugar and continue simmering another minute.


6. Strain into cups and serve hot.



Let me know if you want variations such as Kashmiri chai, kadak chai, or adrak elaichi chai.

Kebahagiaannya, murah atau mahal, di satu sisi.

Penyembuhan di satu sisi, sentuhan di sisi lain.

Kata semua orang di satu sisi, kata hatinya di sisi lain.

Mimpi-mimpinya di satu sisi, mimpiku di sisi lain. ūüĆł
